definitions.example: He came first in the race, whereas his brother came last.

definitions.def: An emphatic form of where.
definitions.example: Wherever have you been all my life?

definitions.def: In or to whatever place; anywhere.
definitions.example: You can sit wherever you like.

definitions.def: Which of two.
Introducing a direct interrogative question (often with correlative or) which indicates doubt between alternatives.
definitions.example: He chose the correct answer, but I don't know whether it was by luck or (whether it was) by skill.

definitions.def: (interrogative) What one or ones (of those mentioned or implied).

definitions.def: An uncertain duration of time, a period of time.

definitions.def: To pass (time) idly.
Until.
The act of speaking in a quiet voice, especially, without vibration of the vocal cords.

definitions.def: To speak softly, or under the breath, so as to be heard only by one near at hand; to utter words without sonant breath; to talk without that vibration in the larynx which gives sonorous, or vocal, sound.
Something complete, without any parts missing.

definitions.def: Entire, undivided.
definitions.example: I ate a whole fish.

definitions.def: In entirety; entirely; wholly.

definitions.def: (interrogative) What person or people; which person or people.

definitions.def: (interrogative) That or those of whom or belonging to whom.

definitions.def: A ball that passes so far from the batsman that the umpire deems it unplayable; the arm signal used by an umpire to signal a wide; the extra run added to the batting side's score
Having a large physical extent from side to side.

definitions.def: Extensively

definitions.def: In a wide manner; across a wide area.
The undomesticated state of a wild animal

definitions.def: To commit random acts of assault, robbery, and rape in an urban setting, especially as a gang.
Untamed; not domesticated; specifically, in an unbroken line of undomesticated animals (as opposed to feral, referring to undomesticated animals whose ancestors were domesticated).
definitions.example: Przewalski's horses are the only remaining wild horses.

definitions.def: Animals, plants, and fungi, not normally domesticated, often to the exclusion of plants, fungi, fish, insects and other invertebrates, and microscopic plants and animals; hence:
To wish, desire.
definitions.example: All the fans were willing their team to win the game.

definitions.def: The execution of a will.
Ready to do something that is not (can't be expected as) a matter of course.

definitions.def: An appendage of an animal's (bird, bat, insect) body that enables it to fly; a similar fin at the side of a ray or similar fish

definitions.def: To injure slightly (as with a gunshot), especially in the wing or arm.
One who has won or often wins.

Traditionally the fourth of the four seasons, typically regarded as being from December 23 to March 20 in continental regions of the Northern Hemisphere or the months of June, July and August in the Southern Hemisphere. It is the time when the sun is lowest in the sky, resulting in short days, and the time of year with the lowest atmospheric temperatures for the region.
To spend the winter (in a particular place).
definitions.example: When they retired, they hoped to winter in Florida.

definitions.def: Metal formed into a thin, even thread, now usually by being drawn through a hole in a steel die.
definitions.example: This election is going to go right to the wire

definitions.def: To fasten with wire, especially with reference to wine bottles, corks, or fencing.
definitions.example: We need to wire that hole in the fence.

definitions.def: To become wise.
definitions.example: After Mo had a word with him, he wised up.

definitions.def: Showing good judgement or the benefit of experience.
definitions.example: "It is a profitable thing, if one is wise, to seem foolish" - Aeschylus

definitions.def: Way, manner, method.
A desire, hope, or longing for something or for something to happen.

definitions.def: To desire; to want.
definitions.example: I'll come tomorrow, if you wish it.

definitions.def: In the context of which the present document or ruling is made.

definitions.def: In or into the interior; inside.
In the inner part, spatially; physically inside.

definitions.def: Outside, externally. This is still used in the names of some civil parishes in England, e.g. St Cuthbert Without.
definitions.example: Being from a large, poor family, he learned to live without.

definitions.def: Outside of, beyond.

definitions.def: Unless, except (introducing a clause).
Attestation of a fact or event; testimony.

definitions.def: To furnish proof of, to show.
definitions.example: 1667: round he throws his baleful eyes / That witness'd huge affliction and dismay — John Milton, Paradise Lost, Book 1 ll. 56-7

definitions.def: An adult female human.
To staff with female labor.
Something that causes amazement or awe; a marvel.

definitions.def: To be affected with surprise or admiration; to be struck with astonishment; to be amazed; to marvel; often followed by at.

definitions.def: Tending to excite wonder; surprising, extraordinary.

definitions.def: Exceedingly, to a great extent.
The substance making up the central part of the trunk and branches of a tree. Used as a material for construction, to manufacture various items, etc. or as fuel.

definitions.def: To cover or plant with trees.

definitions.def: Mad, insane, crazed.
Made of wood.

definitions.def: The hair of the sheep, llama and some other ruminants.
(usually in the plural) Operation; action.

definitions.def: To do a specific task by employing physical or mental powers.

definitions.def: That is or are functioning.

definitions.def: (with "the") Human collective existence; existence in general.

definitions.def: To consider or cause to be considered from a global perspective; to consider as a global whole, rather than making or focussing on national or other distinctions; compare globalise.
Spanning the world; global.

definitions.def: Throughout the world.

definitions.def: Thinking about unpleasant things that have happened or that might happen; feeling afraid and unhappy.

definitions.def: To be troubled; to give way to mental anxiety or doubt.

definitions.def: Unfavorable; negative; not good.

definitions.def: In a bad manner.

definitions.def: Loss; disadvantage; defeat.

definitions.def: Unfavorable; negative; not good.
definitions.example: Abducting children is bad for mothers.

definitions.def: Something or someone that is the worst
To make worse.
Value.

definitions.def: Having a value of; proper to be exchanged for.

definitions.def: (except in set phrases) To be, become, betide.
definitions.example: Well worth thee, me friend.

definitions.def: Something that would happen, or would be the case, under different circumstances; a potentiality.
An injury, such as a cut, stab, or tear, to a (usually external) part of the body.

definitions.def: To hurt or injure (someone) by cutting, piercing, or tearing the skin.

definitions.def: To enclose (an object) completely in any flexible, thin material such as fabric or paper.

definitions.def: A garment that one wraps around the body to keep oneself warm.

definitions.def: A person who writes, or produces literary work.

definitions.def: Graphism of symbols such as letters that express some meaning.

definitions.def: To form letters, words or symbols on a surface in order to communicate.
definitions.example: The pupil wrote his name on the paper.

definitions.def: To form letters, words or symbols on a surface in order to communicate.
definitions.example: The pupil wrote his name on the paper.

definitions.def: Of, relating, or characteristic of writing (i.e., of that which has been written).
definitions.example: I can speak Japanese fairly well, but I have no understanding whatsoever of written Japanese.

definitions.def: A small, usually uncultivated area adjoining or (now especially) within the precincts of a house or other building.

definitions.def: To confine to a yard.
Expressing joy, celebration, glee, etc.
definitions.example: Yeah! We did it!

definitions.def: A solar year, the time it takes the Earth to complete one revolution of the Sun (between 365.24 and 365.26 days depending on the point of reference).
definitions.example: we moved to this town a year ago;  I quit smoking exactly one year ago

definitions.def: The day immediately before today; one day ago.

definitions.def: People who are young; young people, collectively; youth.

definitions.def: To become or seem to become younger.
In the early part of growth or life; born not long ago.

definitions.def: That which belongs to you (singular); the possessive second-person singular pronoun used without a following noun.

definitions.def: (reflexive pronoun) Your own self (singular).

definitions.def: The quality or state of being young.

definitions.def: The numeric symbol that represents the cardinal number zero.

definitions.def: No, not any

definitions.def: Each of the five regions of the earth's surface into which it was divided by climatic differences, namely the torrid zone (between the tropics), two temperate zones (between the tropics and the polar circles), and two frigid zones (within the polar circles).

definitions.def: To divide into or assign sections or areas.

definitions.def: To declare to be a fact.

definitions.def: Statement
(heading) To position or be positioned physically.
Erect, not cut down.

definitions.def: Position or reputation in society or a profession.

definitions.def: (grammar) A demonstrative word
That serves to demonstrate, show or prove

(grammar) A type of noun that refers anaphorically to another noun or noun phrase, but which cannot ordinarily be preceded by a determiner and rarely takes an attributive adjective. English examples include I, you, him, who, me, my, each other.
To recognize someone or something as different from others based on its characteristics.

definitions.def: The act by which something is distinguished or told apart.
That serves to distinguish.
(grammar) The plural number.
Consisting of or containing more than one of something.
A large cup for hot liquids, usually having a handle and used without a saucer.

definitions.def: To strike in the face.

definitions.def: Easily fooled, gullible.
The science of the design of equipment, especially so as to reduce operator fatigue, discomfort and injury.
definitions.example: Ergonomics is increasingly important in office-product design.
